channel.title: Articles on Dwight Spencer - 0x5DCBF78E3F9C3FE3
channel.description: Recent content in Articles on Dwight Spencer - 0x5DCBF78E3F9C3FE3

item.title: Rules, Types, and Glue: A Multi-Paradigm Architecture for Game Simulation
item.author: dwightaspencer@gmail.com (Dwight Spencer)
item.description: A technical evaluation of Prolog, ML-style types (Coalton), and Common Lisp as a layered architecture for game simulation engines.

item.title: GitHub's TOS Won't Save You: Why Your Code, Privacy & Copyrights Are at Risk
item.author: dwightaspencer@gmail.com (Dwight Spencer)
item.description: How GitHub's Terms of Service fail to protect your privacy, copyrights, and code from AI training.

item.title: Privacy Canaries: A better tweety bird
item.author: dwightaspencer@gmail.com (Dwight Spencer)
item.description: A warrant canary is a statement that declares that an organization has not taken certain actions.
